picks.quote: in my predictions, I said, you know, I think Hamzach is going to win this by first round submission or TKO. But I wouldn't be surprised if Hamzach won by decision.
I think Amav will be the next challenger at middleweight. And I think that would be a lot more competitive of a fight than Drius.
I think he's one of the only guys who could beat Ankollay because of the wrestling.
